# UI/UX Pro Max Skill

This skill provides expert-level UI/UX improvements for web projects, focusing on modern design principles, accessibility, and user experience optimization.

## Capabilities

- Analyze existing templates and styles for UI/UX issues
- Suggest modern design improvements
- Implement responsive design fixes
- Enhance accessibility (WCAG compliance)
- Optimize user flows and interactions
- Provide design system recommendations

## Usage

When invoked, this skill will:

1. Analyze the current UI/UX state of the project
2. Identify areas for improvement
3. Provide actionable recommendations
4. Implement changes where appropriate

## Assets

- `templates/`: Example improved templates
- `styles/`: Modern CSS frameworks and utilities
- `guidelines.md`: UI/UX best practices guide

## Workflow

1. Assess current design
2. Prioritize improvements
3. Implement changes iteratively
4. Test and validate enhancements
